Document:
# Visitors
Visitors are humanoid Free Agents who arrive at the station by shuttle with their own equipment and backgrounds. Unlike most crew, they have no duty to Nanotrasen — but they are also not assigned any antagonist objectives. What they do with their time on the station is largely up to them.
Visitors are full humanoids with speech, hands, and the ability to interact with the station like any crew member.
## Variants
- [bold]Syndicate Disaster Victim[/bold] — a Syndicate-aligned civilian who has ended up on the station, perhaps against their will. Armed with basic Syndicate gear. Part of the Syndicate faction, but has no specific orders. - [bold]Black Marketeer[/bold] — an entrepreneurial visitor who arrived with goods to trade. What they sell, and to whom, is their own business. - [bold]Cossack[/bold] — a warrior from somewhere far away who arrived with EVA gear and a distinct accent. Speaks in an... interesting manner, owing to several layered speech quirks.
